_comment: Application for Sierra Nevada Pale Ale — real label pair (beer/sierra-nevada-pale-ale-front.jpg + back.jpg). Front label confirms: 'SIERRA NEVADA®' (brand), 'PALE ALE' + 'HANDCRAFTED ALE' (class/type), brewer 'Sierra Nevada Brewing Co., Chico, CA & Mills River, NC'. ABV 5.6% and net_contents 12 fl oz confirmed from retail sources (fine print not legible in photos); not COLA-verified. COLA brand_name UNVERIFIED: likely 'Sierra Nevada Pale Ale' (full product) or 'Sierra Nevada' (brand only with Pale Ale as class/type designation).
